base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_4_4_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Castle — Bowser-maze debut (wrong-path loops). Three paths, only one leads forward. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Castle — Bowser-maze debut (wrong-path loops). Three paths, only one leads forward; must memorize correct door sequence (middle-top / top-top / top).
